# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for EC2 instances with EBS volumes for our application data. Focus on getting the instances running quickly. We'll add encryption and backup policies in phase 2 after we validate the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

Outputs:

    "InstanceIP":
        Description: IP address of instance
        Value: Fn::GetAtt Instance.PublicIp
    "Volume1": 
        Description: Volume ID for /var/log directory
        Value: '<<Insert volume id>>'
    "Volume2": 
        Description: Volume ID for /var/lib/mysql data directory
        Value: '<<Insert volume id>>'

Resource name: ec2-instance
Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
Properties:
  ImageId: <<Replace with ami-id>>
  InstanceType: t2.micro
  BlockDeviceMappings:
    - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
      Ebs:
        VolumeSize: 50 # GB 
        DeleteOnTermination: True

    - DeviceName: /dev/xvdb
      Ebs:
        VolumeSize: 48000 # MB 
        DeleteOnTermination: True

    SecurityGroups: [ '<<Replace with id of existing security group>>' ]
  TagSpecifications :
    - ResourceType: instance 
      Tags: 
        - Key : Name 
          Value : "ec2-instance"
DependsOn:  ec2-instance
Condition: HasVolume
